name: Bella's Trattoria
tagline: Handmade pasta and wood-fired classics in the heart of Austin.
about: Family-run since 1998, Bella's Trattoria brings the warmth of a Roman kitchen to South Austin. Every plate of pasta is rolled by hand each morning, our sauces simmer all day, and our wine list is chosen to match. Whether it's a weeknight dinner or a celebration, you'll be treated like family.

heroImage.alt: Warm, candlelit dining room at Bella's Trattoria

aboutImage.alt: A plate of fresh handmade tagliatelle

services.name: Dinner Service
services.description: Seasonal handmade pasta, wood-fired mains, and an all-Italian wine list.

services.name: Private Events
services.description: Book our back room for up to 30 guests — birthdays, rehearsals, and team dinners.

services.name: Weekend Brunch
services.description: Frittatas, fresh pastries, and bottomless Bellinis every Saturday and Sunday.

gallery.alt: Diners enjoying dinner at the restaurant
A wood-fired pizza fresh from the oven

testimonials.quote: The best Italian in Austin, hands down. The carbonara is worth the drive across town.
testimonials.author: Maria G., regular since 2012

testimonials.quote: We hosted our anniversary dinner here and the staff made it unforgettable.
testimonials.author: The Delgado family
